description: Camelot, Castle’s 2024 album is a chronicle of the artist in early middle age, charting a more real, more rooted, and more metaphorical place than the fabled Camelot of the Early Middle Ages. Her seventh record is at once her most monumental and unguarded to date, demonstrating a mastery of rendering her verse and melodies alike with crisply poignant economy. “Castle’s singing carries the joy of life. It’s what helps keep the artist perched on the vanguard of celestial country and fantastical folk, a title she affirms once again.” (The Fader)
title: Jennifer Castle Concert
